src/main/java/org/isaqb/onlinetrainer/Bu.general_idea: Replace javax.annotation.Generated with jakarta.annotation.Generated to comply with Jakarta EE namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
Update hardcoded build information fields to reflect the new version, timestamp, and commit details.
Use Java 15+ text blocks for multi-line string literals to improve readability.
src/main/java/org/isaqb/onlinetrainer/Bu.human_impl: private static final String GIT_COMMIT_MESSAGE = """ change to latest 2.x SpringBoot """;

src/main/java/org/isaqb/onlinetrainer/Bu.general_idea: Change the generated annotation value to indicate the file is now generated by Maven instead of Gradle.

src/main/java/org/isaqb/onlinetrainer/Co.general_idea: Replace string concatenation with Java 15+ text blocks for improved readability of multi-line HTML strings.
src/main/java/org/isaqb/onlinetrainer/Co.human_impl: Replaced '"<!-- ... -->" + "<script ...>"' with a triple-quoted text block """...""".

src/main/java/org/isaqb/onlinetrainer/Da.general_idea: Replace javax.annotation imports with jakarta.annotation to comply with Spring Boot 3 and Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements.
Add a boolean flag to allow skipping task definitions during configuration processing.
Implement a method to generate URL streams, respecting the new skip flag.
src/main/java/org/isaqb/onlinetrainer/Da.human_impl: public Stream<String> generateUrls() { return skip ? Stream.empty() : urls.stream().map(UrlTemplateConfig::generateUrls).flatMap(Collection::stream); }

src/main/java/org/isaqb/onlinetrainer/Mo.general_idea: Replace javax.annotation imports with jakarta.annotation to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.

src/main/java/org/isaqb/onlinetrainer/ca.general_idea: Replace javax.persistence imports with jakarta.persistence to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.

src/main/java/org/isaqb/onlinetrainer/lo.general_idea: Add a null check for the input string to prevent potential NullPointerException during conversion.
Replace single TaskParser dependency with specific Asciidoc and YAML parsers to support multiple formats.
src/main/java/org/isaqb/onlinetrainer/lo.human_impl: private final AsciidocTaskParser adocParser; private final YamlTaskParser yamlParser;

src/main/java/org/isaqb/onlinetrainer/lo.general_idea: Switch from @AllArgsConstructor to @RequiredArgsConstructor and add final modifiers to fields for better immutability practices.
Simplify URL generation logic by moving it from stream mapping to a direct method call on the configuration object.
Extract URL-to-Task conversion into a dedicated method that selects the parser based on file extension.
Implement logic to guess the correct parser (Asciidoc, YAML, or Chain) based on the file suffix.
Enable support for YAML task definitions alongside existing Asciidoc definitions.
Add informational logging to report the number of tasks configured per topic.
src/main/java/org/isaqb/onlinetrainer/lo.human_impl: log.info("Task topic '{}' configured with {} tasks.", topic, tasks.size());

src/main/java/org/isaqb/onlinetrainer/lo.general_idea: Replace the deprecated `new URL(String)` constructor with `new URI(String).toURL()` to comply with stricter Java 21 deprecation warnings and best practices.
Add handling for `URISyntaxException` thrown by the new `URI` constructor to ensure the code compiles and runs correctly.

src/main/java/org/isaqb/onlinetrainer/mo.general_idea: Replace String.format with the String.formatted method introduced in Java 15 for cleaner string interpolation.
Replace String.format with the String.formatted method introduced in Java 15 for cleaner string interpolation.
src/main/java/org/isaqb/onlinetrainer/mo.human_impl: String.format("'%s' is null or empty", fieldName) -> "'%s' is null or empty".formatted(fieldName)

src/main/java/org/isaqb/onlinetrainer/mo.general_idea: Replace manual casting after instanceof check with pattern matching syntax introduced in Java 16.
src/main/java/org/isaqb/onlinetrainer/mo.human_impl: if (value instanceof String) { String asString = (String) value; ... } -> if (value instanceof String asString) { ... }

src/main/java/org/isaqb/onlinetrainer/re.general_idea: Remove the explicit import for the nested record class since it is defined within the same file and package.

src/main/java/org/isaqb/onlinetrainer/st.general_idea: Replace javax.persistence imports with jakarta.persistence to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
Add @Column annotations to explicitly map fields to database columns, likely to avoid reserved keyword conflicts (e.g., 'key', 'value') in newer H2 versions.
